name: stride-copilot-ideation
description: Turn an idea into shipped Stride tasks from GitHub Copilot CLI. Two named skills — stride-ideation-ideate (interactive ideation session producing a committed requirements doc; supports --profile lean|product|discovery|lean-startup to select the round structure and reviewer rubric, --input <file> to seed from a brain-dump, --continue to refine a prior doc, plus a recommended-first profile prompt, a per-round completeness recap, an 'I'm not sure — propose candidates' path on every question, intra-session draft autosave/resume, and a human decision on advisory reviewer findings) and stride-ideation-stridify (decomposes the requirements into a Stride batch JSON, commits it for audit, and — after a human preview-and-approval gate, or --yes to bypass — POSTs it to the Stride API). Copilot port of cheezy/stride-ideation; pair with cheezy/stride-copilot for task-lifecycle skills.
